datasets.name: EDTeKLA Textbook Corpus
datasets.notes: Canonical textbook corpus: 486 entries (436 dev + 50 held-out) across difficulty tiers 1-5.

datasets.name: EDTeKLA Master Corpus (Merged)
datasets.notes: Derived merge: 62 gold standard (itwêwina) + 342 textbook entries = 404. Not the full textbook corpus (486). Obtain from crk-translate repo (private).

datasets.name: EDTeKLA Development Subset v1
datasets.notes: 124-entry dev subset (62 gold standard + 62 textbook entries) for rapid iteration.
